description: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. With substandard orthography (CUDL), "in a known script with known atrocious spelling" (Goitein), mentioning people including Avraham and Abū l-Ḥusayn. Mentions arriving in Yāfā (Jaffa). The name ʿAllūsh appears on verso. Dating: Likely 11th century. (Information mainly from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. עם כתיב ירוד. מזכיר אנשים שונים ואת יפו. תאריך: כנראה המאה ה-11
